channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Chicken - Sat May 30 21:32:46 UTC 2026
item.description:
JetBrains language support for the Chicken esoteric programming language. Provides .chicken file recognition, syntax highlighting, and a bundled Chicken runner.
vendor: Olivér Raisz downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.oraisz.chicken

item.title: Omni Player - Tue Jun 02 14:25:17 UTC 2026
item.description:
A media player directly integrated in your JetBrains IDE interface. It controls your music through the Windows System Media Transport Controls API, showing the current...
vendor: Paco Gillet downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.paco-gillet.omni-player

item.title: Tengo - Mon Jun 01 10:58:48 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for Tengo, a small, dynamic, fast, secure scripting language embeddable in Go applications. Features: Syntax highlighting Brace matching, code...
vendor: Pavel Vyazankin downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.blackcat.tengo

item.title: IOSP Analyzer for Python - Tue Jun 02 17:08:16 UTC 2026
item.description:
Highlights violations of the Integration Operation Segregation Principle (IOSP) in Python code. A function should either integrate (only call other functions) or...
vendor: CCD Akademie GmbH downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.ccdakademie.iospanalyzer.python

item.title: Huawei JDBC Drivers Pack - Tue Jun 02 16:14:03 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Vasilii Chernov downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.tjlee.huaweijdbcdriverspack

item.title: Json Inject - Mon Jun 01 15:55:27 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: 林万程 downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.linwancen.plugin.inject

vendor: Kirill Lavrov downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.lavr.ssm-graph-plugin

item.description:

item.title: PseudoScript - Fri May 29 23:44:40 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for PseudoScript (.pds) — a pseudoprogramming language: you code the abstraction and let it autogenerate, rather than hand-maintaining the output. It...
vendor: Flying Dice downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.pseudoscript.pds

item.title: NPM Safety Guard - Mon Jun 01 06:35:19 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: SendWaveHub downloads: 12 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.sendwavehub.npmsafetyguard

item.description:
